# CIA Reading Room cia-rdp67r00587a000100150040-6: Supply of a Xerox Copier for ORD Use

Creator: CIA Reading Room
Date: 1964-04-24T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 37
Subjects: CIA Reading Room

Sanitized - Approved For Release : - 7R00587A00010015O "q P'W - 7., ~ QR 843-64 24 April 1984 25X1A9a MEMORANDUM FOR: Chief, OL/PSD THROUGH: Assistant Deputy Director for Science and Technology SUBJECT: Supply of a Xerox Copier for QRD Use ORF) 571-64, Justification of Xerox 813 Copier 1. Prior to the submission by 011) of the requisition for a Xerox Model 813 on 28 February 1964, a study of the requirements for such equipment was made by the Administrative office. Projected requi-re- ments justify the acquisition of a larger machine Model 33SC11. However, in the interests of economy and efficiency the smaller model was requested to provide an interim capability and minimum support until 011) reaches its authorized strength and its workload is commen- surate with the scope of its mission and the increased number of personnel assigned. 2. Since the original study was completed, additional reviews have been made of the reproduction assets within E. /S&T and of the ORD requirements for such support equipment. The redistribution of equipment within DD/S & T is not logical, since the requirements justifying the equipment in the first place are still valid. The acquisition of additional equipment is the alternative. 3. In addition to the increasing scope of the o projects of a high priority interest to the National intelligence community, USIB, the Agency and CO1P0R (targets, collection techniques, and specific disciplined state-of-the-art emphasis) have been established and recently assigned to ORD as the prime responsible agent.
